---
name: 🐞 Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[BUG] Descriptive title"
labels: bug
---

## ✏️Bug Description

Describe the bug in a clear and concise manner.

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce

List the steps needed to reproduce the bug:

1. Go to `...`
2. Click on `...`
3. Observe `...`

## 🤔 Expected Behavior

What did you expect to happen?

## 🖥️ Environment Information

- Operating System: [e.g. Windows 10, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Software Version: [e.g. v1.2.3]

## 📄 Logs or Error Messages

Include any relevant system or console messages.

## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots that help illustrate the problem.

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have verified that there is no similar issue.
- [ ] I have included all relevant information to reproduce the issue.
